query: SELECT m.member_id, m.name, m.email, m.contact_number, m.address, c.username, c.password_hash, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.role_code ORDER BY r.role_code) AS role_codes FROM Credentials c JOIN members m ON m.member_id = c.member_id LEFT JOIN member_roles mr ON mr.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.role_id = mr.role_id WHERE c.username = %s GROUP BY m.member_id, m.name, m.email, m.contact_number, m.address, c.username, c.password_hash

plan.query: /* select#1 */ select '28' AS `member_id`,'Hostel Office' AS `name`,'hostel.office@fixiit.iitgn.ac.in' AS `email`,'+91 9000000012' AS `contact_number`,'Hostel Administration Office' AS `address`,'admin' AS `username`,'240be518fabd2724ddb6f04eeb1da5967448d7e831c08c8fa822809f74c720a9' AS `password_hash`,group_concat(distinct `r`.`role_code` order by `r`.`role_code` ASC separator ',') AS `role_codes` from `fixiit_db`.`credentials` `c` join `fixiit_db`.`members` `m` left join `fixiit_db`.`member_roles` `mr` on((`mr`.`member_id` = '28')) left join `fixiit_db`.`roles` `r` on((`r`.`role_id` = `mr`.`role_id`)) where (('admin' = 'admin')) group by '28','Hostel Office','hostel.office@fixiit.iitgn.ac.in','+91 9000000012','Hostel Administration Office','admin','240be518fabd2724ddb6f04eeb1da5967448d7e831c08c8fa822809f74c720a9'

query: SELECT 1 AS is_admin FROM member_roles mr JOIN roles r ON r.role_id = mr.role_id WHERE mr.member_id = %s AND UPPER(r.role_code) = 'ADMIN' LIMIT 1

plan.query: /* select#1 */ select 1 AS `is_admin` from `fixiit_db`.`member_roles` `mr` join `fixiit_db`.`roles` `r` where ((`r`.`role_id` = `mr`.`role_id`) and (`mr`.`member_id` = 28) and (upper(`r`.`role_code`) = 'ADMIN')) limit 1

description: User ticket listing with filter + order
query: SELECT ticket_id, title, description, member_id, location_id, category_id, priority, status_id, created_at, updated_at FROM tickets WHERE member_id = %s ORDER BY created_at DESC

plan.query: /* select#1 */ select `fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`ticket_id` AS `ticket_id`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`title` AS `title`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`description` AS `description`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`member_id` AS `member_id`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`location_id` AS `location_id`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`priority` AS `priority`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`status_id` AS `status_id`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`created_at` AS `created_at`,`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`updated_at` AS `updated_at` from `fixiit_db`.`tickets` where (`fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`member_id` = 2) order by `fixiit_db`.`tickets`.`created_at` desc
